factions.name: The Hollow Hand
factions.description: A network of thieves, smugglers, and information brokers operating in the shadows of Ashvale.

factions.name: Ashvale Guard
factions.description: Lord Ashworth's enforcers. Underpaid, undermanned, and losing faith in their lord.

factions.name: House Ashworth
factions.description: The ruling family of Ashvale. Once proud, now crumbling under secrets and debt.

factions.name: Church of the Ashen Light
factions.description: An austere religious order that sees suffering as divine will. Brother Maren leads the local chapter.

factions.name: Ironmarch Legion
factions.description: A militaristic faction from the east. They smell weakness in Ashvale like wolves smell blood.

factions.name: Thornwood Circle
factions.description: Ancient keepers of the forest. They've watched Ashvale's rot spread for decades.
